title: Milta Hai Chance by Chance
overview: Milta Hai Chance By Chance, a comedy movie. Starring Gracy Singh, Aslam Khan, Vishal Kaushik is directed by Ramesh Modi. Some of the story takes place while they are travelling in a car.
